<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Search; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ft.explain/ * * Return the execution plan for a complex query. */ class FTEXPLAIN extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'FT.EXPLAIN'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { [$index, $query] = $arguments; $commandArguments = []; if (!empty($arguments[2])) { $commandArguments = $arguments[2]->toArray(); } parent::setArguments(array_merge( [$index, $query], $commandArguments )); } }
